seoTitle: Seaford Meadows vs Seal Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Seaford Meadows and Seal Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Seaford Meadows vs Seal Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Seaford Meadows and Seal Bay.
heading: Seaford Meadows vs Seal Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Seaford Meadows, South Australia and Seal Bay, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Seal Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Seaford Meadows (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Seaford Meadows or Seal Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Seaford Meadows has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Seal Bay scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Seaford Meadows scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Seal Bay scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Seaford Meadows or Seal Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Seal Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
